positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling constellations and subtle nebula dust. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and bioluminescent fantasy art, utilizing thick, clean black outlines (line art) over a deep midnight blue and gold palette. Focus on strong silhouettes and negative space. The owl should have sharp, stylized features, and the constellation elements should resemble geometric patterns. Highly detailed, centered composition, excellent contrast for screen printing, vector graphic aesthetic, perfect for apparel print.
